name: Tempaux
short_description: Tempaux is a four-directional rhythm game inspired by both the gameplay of cornerstone arcade rhythm games from around the world, and the customization and appearance of classic operating systems. Blast incoming notes with your ship, develop your skills, and compete to become the best player.
detailed_description:
Tempaux - A four-directional rhythm game.

Welcome to Tempaux. Inspired by classic, highly-replayable arcade rhythm games and their unique presentations, Tempaux seeks to provide unique, yet simplistic gameplay. Your primary objective is to venture into the depths of space and harvest the rare element known as rhythmithril. Drawing in the substance with your ship's advanced speakers, you must blast incoming asteroids with your laser beam as they hit the sweet spot. Engage in customizable gameplay attuned to accommodate both casual and competitive players, and experience a user interface inspired by the look and feel of operating systems from the past.

Key Features

  • Precise quad-directional gameplay

  • Customizable user interface

  • A level editor with extensive tools to allow detailed filters, shaders, and backgrounds
